div1.entryFree: Twit, to reproach sneeringly: she --s me with my falsehood to my friend, Gent. IV, 2, 8. and t. with cowardice a man half dead, H6A III, 2, 55. there's for --ing me with perjury, H6C V, 5, 40. Partic. twit: hath he not t. our sovereign lady here with ignominious words, H6B III, 1, 178.
